description_long: This is a large, ornate sword featuring a broad, single-edged blade with a slightly curved profile and a pointed tip. The blade is silver with prominent black engravings or runes running vertically along its surface, giving it a mystical or ceremonial appearance. The guard is elaborate and gold-colored, with one side extending upward in a dramatic, wing-like flourish, providing both protection and visual flair. The handle is black with gold accents, straight and cylindrical, ending in a gold pommel that matches the guard. The overall construction suggests a blend of decorative and functional design, suitable for display or ceremonial use. The materials and craftsmanship indicate a high-quality, visually striking weapon that would stand out in any urban or fantasy setting.
description: A large, ornate sword with a broad, engraved silver blade, gold winged guard, and black-and-gold handle. The blade features mystical runes and the guard is highly decorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full engraved blade, gold winged guard, and straight handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blade's thin profile and the upward extension of the guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reverse side of the engraved blade and the back of the guard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blade's edge and the guard's three-dimensional structure.
attribute_blade_type: single-edged, broad, slightly curved, pointed tip, engraved
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, black with gold accents, capped pommel
attribute_ornamentation: engraved runes on blade, ornate gold guard
